title: Balance Constraints
description: Single source of truth for the numeric caps and tier corridors that every AI-generation entry point must enforce. Hard caps used to live in moderation-task prose only, which let any non-orchestrator producer of `GeneratedFaction` (community editor, hand-edited pack) bypass them. This schema makes the caps shape-validatable at every entry point — orchestrator, pack loader, editor import. Tier corridors mirror the values in `content-schema/balance/corridor.json` (consumed by `npm run validate:balance`); the moderation and optimizer tasks read this schema as the canonical contract.

maxHp.description: Hard upper bound on a single unit's HP. Enforced regardless of optimizer output.

maxAtk.description: Hard upper bound on a single unit's attack. Enforced regardless of optimizer output.

maxDef.description: Hard upper bound on a single unit's defense. Enforced regardless of optimizer output.

maxAbilitiesPerUnit.description: Hard upper bound on the number of abilities attached to a single unit.

tierCorridors.description: Per-tier stat corridors — low/high band a unit must land inside unless an ability justifies the outlier. Mirrors content-schema/balance/corridor.json.
